news.title: UW–Madison study shows how school districts and universities ‘connected the dots’ to build equity-focused school leadership across 21 states
news.summary_en: A new study from UW–Madison education researchers Aziz Awaludin and Richard Halverson offers a detailed, data‑driven look at how school districts and universities worked together to design principal preparation programs with equity at the center.

news.title: UW–Madison faculty member appointed to Michigan Black Student Project task force
news.summary_en: UW–Madison’s Naomi Mae W., an assistant professor in the School of Education’s Department of Educational Policy Studies, has been appointed to a statewide task force for the Michigan Black Student Project.

news.title: UW–Madison MFA artists recognized at Wisconsin Artists Biennial
news.summary_en: Works by UW–Madison MFA candidates Fatemeh Fani and Swan Ferraro were recognized at the Wisconsin Artists Biennial, which took place Feb. 7–April 19 at the Museum of Wisconsin Art (MOWA).

news.title: Wisconsin Evaluation Collaborative invites researchers across UW–Madison to use its expertise
news.summary_en: The Wisconsin Evaluation Collaborative (WEC) is building deeper connections with campus partners by providing evaluation expertise in support of research and program improvement.
